hooks.command:
bash -c '
if [ -f omega/state.md ]; then
  echo "=== OMEGA STATE ==="
  cat omega/state.md
  echo ""
  echo "=== ULTIMI LOG ==="
  tail -30 omega/log.md 2>/dev/null || echo "(nessun log)"
  echo ""

  # Calcola score
  SCORE=0

  # Documentazione (20 pt): MVP=5, PRD=5, design-system=5, roadmap=5
  [ -f omega/MVP.md ] && SCORE=$((SCORE+5))
  [ -f omega/PRD.md ] && SCORE=$((SCORE+5))
  [ -f omega/design-system.md ] && SCORE=$((SCORE+5))
  [ -f omega/roadmap.md ] && SCORE=$((SCORE+5))

  # Fasi (50 pt): state.md indica la fase corrente
  FASE=$(grep -oP "(?<=Fase: )\d+" omega/state.md 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  case "$FASE" in
    1) SCORE=$((SCORE+10)) ;;
    2) SCORE=$((SCORE+20)) ;;
    3) SCORE=$((SCORE+30)) ;;
    4) SCORE=$((SCORE+40)) ;;
    5) SCORE=$((SCORE+50)) ;;
  esac

  # Sicurezza (15 pt): audit.md esiste e zero critici aperti
  if [ -f omega/audit.md ]; then
    CRITICI=$(grep -c "â¬œ aperto" omega/audit.md 2>/dev/null || echo 1)
    [ "$CRITICI" = "0" ] && SCORE=$((SCORE+15)) || SCORE=$((SCORE+5))
  fi

  # Testing (15 pt): piani test in omega/plans/ o test file esistenti
  HAS_TESTS=0
  [ -d src/tests ] && HAS_TESTS=1
  [ -d e2e ] && HAS_TESTS=1
  [ -d k6 ] && HAS_TESTS=1
  [ -f vitest.config.ts ] && HAS_TESTS=1
  [ "$HAS_TESTS" = "1" ] && SCORE=$((SCORE+15))

  echo "[OMEGA SCORE] $SCORE/100"

  if [ -f omega/design-system.md ]; then
    echo ""
    echo "=== DESIGN SYSTEM (regole) ==="
    sed -n "/## Palette/,/^## [^P]/p" omega/design-system.md | head -20
    echo ""
    sed -n "/## Regole assolute/,/^## /p" omega/design-system.md | head -15
  fi

  # Segnala autopilot attivo
  if [ -f omega/autopilot-state.md ]; then
    AUTOPILOT_STATUS=$(grep "ModalitÃ :" omega/autopilot-state.md | head -1)
    AUTOPILOT_STEP=$(grep "Step corrente:" omega/autopilot-state.md | head -1)
    if grep -q "ACTIVE\|IN_PROGRESS" omega/autopilot-state.md 2>/dev/null; then
      echo ""
      echo "=== AUTOPILOT ATTIVO ==="
      echo "$AUTOPILOT_STATUS"
      echo "$AUTOPILOT_STEP"
    fi
  fi

  # Segnala DESIGN.md
  if [ -f DESIGN.md ]; then
    echo ""
    echo "=== DESIGN.md TROVATO ==="
    echo "Import design esterno disponibile â€” usa /omega:omega-stitch"
  fi
fi
'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == omega/plans/*.md ]]; then UNCHECKED=$(grep -c "^- \[ \]" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); CHECKED=$(grep -c "^- \[x\]" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$UNCHECKED" = "0" ] && [ "$CHECKED" -gt "0" ]; then echo "[OMEGA] Tutti i checkbox completati in $FILE â€” ricorda di aggiornare: ## Stato: COMPLETE"; fi; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -f omega/state.md ]; then TIMESTAMP=$(date "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"); if ! grep -q "SESSIONE INTERROTTA" omega/state.md 2>/dev/null; then echo "" >> omega/state.md; echo "## Sessione" >> omega/state.md; echo "Ultima sessione: $TIMESTAMP â€” chiusa" >> omega/state.md; fi; fi'
